subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Eternity speaketh through the Tongue of the Dawning-Place of Names, Who is remembered by the Most Great Name: Verily, there is no God but Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینطق لسان القدم بلسان مطلع الاسماء الذی یذکر بالاسم الاعظم انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @prophecy and fulfillment, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
